questions.question: Describe the key characteristics of the Chalk and Talk method in the teaching-learning process, highlighting its advantages over other presentation methods.
questions.hint: Provide specific examples to support your answer

questions.question: Compare and contrast the use of PowerPoint presentations with the Chalk and Talk method in terms of student engagement and learning outcomes.
questions.hint: Discuss the limitations of each method

questions.question: A lecturer uses the Chalk and Talk method to teach a large lecture class. What strategies can the lecturer employ to ensure that students are actively engaged and participating in the learning process?
questions.hint: Suggest specific techniques to promote student involvement
